mission.title: karmada: add get function to karmadactl
mission.description:
Signed-off-by: QAQ-rookie <781647222@qq.com>

**What type of PR is this?**
/kind feature 

**What this PR does / why we need it**:
This PR provides the karmadactl get command, get multi-cluster information via karmadactl.

**Which issue(s) this PR fixes**:
Fixes #666

**Special notes for your reviewer**:

**Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?**:

```release-note
NONE
```
